3301900.name: VenusBlood RAGNAROK International
3301900.description:
VenusBlood Ragnarok is a direct sequel to VenusBlood Frontier in the world-famous VenusBlood series. VenusBlood Ragnarok combines deep tactical gameplay with a rich narrative set around Norse mythology. We invite you to experience the story of gods, demons, and morality with an SRPG where your choices will determine the fate of the world. This visual novel masterfully blends strategic conquest with RPG elements, offering a unique experience that caters to fans of deep strategy games.

Five hundred years after the Overlord Loki conquered the Floating Continent of Yggdrasil and founded the Asgard Empire, the flames of war threaten to engulf the realm once again. The Overlord Loki has vanished, the Goddess Odin has departed the mortal coil, and rising tensions between demons, gods, and dark lords threaten to ignite a civil war. Amid the chaos, Vali—a warrior with demonic blood and a vision of Divine-Demon Unification—raises an army to fight for his ideals. Opposed by his sister-in-law Brunhilde, a newly awakened goddess sent to hunt him down, Vali encounters a mysterious youth sharing the same name as the missing Overlord, Loki, who grants him the Key of Yggdrasil. Armed with this power, Vali embarks on a journey to reshape the realm and claim his destiny as the Conqueror of a new age.

Dive into a cast of captivating and complex characters, each with their own motivations, desires, and struggles. Your decisions will define their fates—and yours. Each character’s story intertwines with yours, offering opportunities for alliances, betrayals, and moments of heart-wrenching drama.

Vali Lefay - Prodigious Child of Adversity

Our protagonist. A descendant of the founder of Asgard, a child of the Overlord Loki and the Goddess Tyrca. He was ostracized by his family due to his prominent demonic features. After the death of Odin, he gathered an army for the sake of Divine-Demon Unification. Eventually forced to go on the run, fate led him to a meeting with a youth named Loki who gifted him the Key of Yggdrasil.

Loki - Tactician of the Azure Flame

A mysterious youth who bestowed Vali with the Key of Yggdrasil and proceeded to become his tactician. With a predilection for strategy that belies his youthful looks, he also shares the same name as the Overlord Loki and shows some similarities to the legendary personage. The truth, however, is unknown. Why did he approach Vali, and what is he after...?

Linde Hvedrung - Imperial Captain of the Blaze

The younger sister of Vali's sworn ally, Sieg. She is in love with Vali, and practically kicked down his door in order to join his faction. She serves as the leader of his bodyguard squad, and often dreams of one day becoming his wife.

Hilde - Brilliant War Goddess / Oath of Battle

The Goddess of War, protector of Valhalla, where the throne of the Chief God Odin is located. She is also Vali's half-sister as they share the same father.

Nanna Odin II - Chief God of a New Era

A young goddess groomed by the Imperial Senate to serve as the successor to the title of Chief God. She is inexperienced yet powerful, however she herself prefers to frolic and play rather than take on the stuffy duties of Chief God.

Vidar - Demon Princess of Moonlight

The destined child born of the union between the Overlord Loki and the Chief God Odin. However, as she was born with demonic features, her very existence was threatened by Senators believing in Divine Superiority. Having lived at the same mansion as Vali when he was hidden from the world, she was happy that he treated her as a normal person despite knowing the circumstances of her birth.

And many other characters...

  • Conquer the Realm: Build and deploy armies to expand your influence. Balance resource management, strategic placement, and careful planning to achieve your goals.

  • Military & Political Strategies: Choose between two paths—Law or Chaos—as you shape the fates of characters and nations alike. Each decision has far-reaching consequences. Lead your forces in grid-based combat where positioning, abilities, and synergy can turn the tide of battle.

  • Deep Customization: Tailor your gameplay experience with various units, abilities, and equipment to suit your preferred playstyle.

Fans of the VenusBlood series and newcomers alike will find something to love in this compelling mix of strategy, storytelling, and moral ambiguity. Whether you’re looking for an immersive narrative, challenging tactical gameplay, or a richly detailed world of myth and magic, VenusBlood Ragnarok International delivers on every front.

Are you ready to lead your army and reshape the fate of the Realm? Will you rise as a savior or embrace the shadows of corruption? The choice is yours in VenusBlood Ragnarok Internatonal!
